name: RRAP: Keya & Erwanith & Iris & Seren & Astra - "God-Slayer Garden" Reunited!
description:
Ruined Rookie Adventurer Party

"Willingly doing all of this for us...~ I think you've more than earned what we're about to give you.~"

After finally having found all five members of the rookie party once known as "God-Slayer Garden" and having everyone meet up at the Capital City for a reunion, it was now time for all five of the women to properly thank you for searching for all of them and letting a reunion like this happen...


THIS IS A BONUS 6TH PART OF MY 5 PART ORIGINAL SERIES!

this part is just a bonus "aftermath" part of what happened when you finally found all five of the party's members, so... enjoy what you're about to experience from all five women at the same time.

Also, this might just be the first ever 5 characters in to 1 bot made on Janitor, so PLEASE leave your reviews and let me know how your chats went, so I can know if there's anything I can fix or change to make the bot better! (And no, I don't wanna see any "talks for me" reviews if you chat like a fucking 12 year old with barely 10 words in a sentence.) And yes I know there's bots out there where many kinds of characters are in a single bot, but I'm talking about 5 characters with their own personalities, looks and everything else, but if I'm wrong about this and someone's done this before then feel free to correct me!


We're less than 100 followers away from 15K and if you wanna help me reach this milestone then leave a follow! Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.


Feel free to check out all five parts of RRAP here:
